title: Staff Nurse - Welfare Home | Pasir Ris | 5 Day Week!!  - Up to $4.5k (0580)
description:
Location: Pasir Ris
Salary: $3000-$4500
Working Hours: 5 Days Rotating - No night shift

  • AM – 7am to 4pm
  • PM – 10am to 7pm

Summary

Assist Nurse Manager in providing support and quality care services to clients. Responsible to supervising care staff to ensure physical well-being and safety of clients, including performing of basic nursing care to residents which includes monitoring vital signs, personal hygiene, toileting, feeding and ambulating.


Job Descriptions:

  • Assist in supervision of care staff.
  • Provide care for clients, attending to medical emergency, medication management and administration etc.
  • Ensure compliance to nursing, infection prevention and control, safety requirements and regulations.
  • Maintenance of client medical records and medical follow up schedules.
  • Provide input to clients’ ICP and ensure ICP is executed.
  • Conduct relevant training to staff and health education to clients.
  • Responsible for the induction of all grades of new nursing and care staff.
  • Ensure incident report is put up and submit to Nurse Manager within stipulated timeline.
  • Performs ADLs for residents (e.g personal hygiene, toilet training, feeding, ambulating)
  • Escort residents to the hospital or polyclinics to seek medical treatment or for follow-up reviews; reports to doctor on our assessment of the medical condition/behavioral issues of the residents and feedback to Nurse Manager about the doctor’s assessment, prescription and investigation reports
  • Taking and reporting of vital signs, weight and conduct monthly monitoring of glucose level
  • Collaborate with the therapists in the implementation of the planned therapy to achieve set goals
  • Conduct therapeutic and maintenance programme under the guidance of therapists
  • Engage with residents
  • Observing, documenting & reporting of residents’ condition

Job Requirements:

  • Possess a Diploma or Degree in Nursing
  • Valid Practicing License with Singapore Nursing Board (SNB Registered)
  • Prior experience in Nursing Home or Day Care Centres will be advantageous.

Interested applicants can email your CV to supreme.evelynnchua@gmail.com or whatsapp to +65 89249206

The Supreme HR Advisory Pte. Ltd || 14C7279

Chua Jie Ying (Cai Jie Ying), Evelynn || EA Personnel License R24120580
